## Summary

Describe the route, CMS, SEO/AEO/GEO, claims, legal, analytics or governance change.

## Source basis

- [ ] Related issue linked
- [ ] Source document or ADR listed
- [ ] Implementation register impact reviewed

## Change type

- [ ] SEO metadata / keyword / route
- [ ] AEO FAQ / answer block
- [ ] GEO entity / structured-data support
- [ ] Wix CMS schema or seed record
- [ ] Claims / legal / Trust Center
- [ ] Analytics / conversion event
- [ ] Azure secure handoff placeholder
- [ ] Governance / checklist / workflow

## Required checks

- [ ] No secrets, credentials or customer confidential material included
- [ ] Public claims mapped to claims registry
- [ ] Provider references follow provider disclosure
- [ ] Student/consumer guardrails reviewed where applicable
- [ ] Metadata and H1 reviewed
- [ ] Hreflang/canonical impact reviewed
- [ ] Internal links reviewed
- [ ] Wix staging evidence required before release tag

## Wix evidence

Add screenshots, staged URLs, schema-test output, metadata check, form test and mobile review evidence when applicable.

## Release decision

- [ ] Not a publication release
- [ ] Ready for Wix staging implementation
- [ ] Ready for release tag after evidence review
